name: QA 1555
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1555

exercise PM_CTXFLAG_METADATA_ONLY and PM_CTXFLAG_LAST_VOLUME

flags to pmNewContext()



valgrind variant, see qa/1553 for the non-valgrind variant



check-group-include: archive



Copyright (c) 2025 Ken McDonell.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py centos6-container reproduce
